race.comment: DELICATE RULER (1) pushed forward from a wide draw last time and found a forward position then knocked up in the straight to finish eighth over 1435m at this track. Will go forward and be in this for a long way, with an improved effort on the cards. FINADO (5) started at $3.50 last time and ran below expectations, finishing sixth and beaten 4 lengths at this track over 1200m after being in contention on the turn. Finds a nice race and can make amends. SHASFA (12) missed the placings two runs back then didn't feature last start when tenth over 1000m at this track. Nicely placed to feature in the finish. OUTLAW MUSIC (9) returned from a break and was on dirt for the first time last start when 3.5 lengths back in third over 1200m at this track. Has a high cruising speed. Not to be discounted. BEYOND THE WALL (2) can feature in the finish.
